content.text: I'll read each frame and judge against the rubric.

[
{"ruleId":"V1","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Each frame has a single load-bearing element: the retrieval card in F1, the you/role comparison in F2, the emerging guess in F3, the outlined candidate with rose flag in F4, and the closing card in F5-F6.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V2","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The busiest frame (F2) shows two labeled columns and one dial, well under the four-novel-element budget.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V3","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Labels sit on their objects: 'YOU'/'THE ROLE' head their columns, 'candidate' sits under the vector, 'size, not fit' beside the flag, 'score: 96' by the dial.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V4","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All text functions as card prompts, column headers, or annotations of visible referents (flag, vector, dial).","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V5","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Card prompts, column entries, and readouts are all rendered at comfortably readable size.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V6","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The cards, columns, vector, dial, and extensions chip all sit inside the frame with margins.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V7","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"No text or labels overlap; the 'size, not fit' annotation and 'score: 96' readout sit clear of the vector and dial.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V8","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The candidate vector is periwinkle blue, the dial needle and score readout are lilac, and the unearned-win flag is rose — consistent with token semantics.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V9","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The stray marks in F3 read as the incipient build of the candidate vector and angle arc rather than decoration; every element carries propositional role.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V10","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The sequence delivers the intent: retrieval card, you/role columns pooling into a lilac dial, a guess card with outlined candidate and hidden score, then the candidate stretching longer with lilac score climbing to 96, a rose flag marking the unearned win, and the closing walk-home card with an extensions-menu chip.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V11","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Annotations touch their referents: 'size, not fit' beside the flag, 'candidate' under the vector, and the extensions chip near its pointing arrow.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V12","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Across frames the candidate builds from a fragment (F3) into a full outlined vector with flag (F4), reading as a continuous construction in reasoning order.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V13","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Generous negative space and clear top-to-bottom reading order across all six frames.","suggestion":""}
]
